title: TrustLayer AI – File & URL Threat Detection System
description: Developed a containerized security analysis system that evaluates files and URLs to detect potential threats using heuristic-based risk scoring. The platform analyzes file signatures, identifies suspicious patterns, and inspects URLs for phishing indicators, providing real-time risk classification with actionable insights through an interactive web interface.

title: Album Management System
description:
Album Management System is a full-stack web application designed to provide a seamless platform for browsing and managing music albums. The system features a modern, responsive user interface for end users and a secure admin dashboard for content management.

The application is built using a MERN-based architecture with cloud integration. The frontend, developed with React and Tailwind CSS, communicates with a Node.js and Express backend through RESTful APIs. Album data is stored in MongoDB Atlas, while album cover images are uploaded and delivered efficiently via Cloudinary.

The admin panel includes secure authentication using JSON Web Tokens (JWT), allowing administrators to perform full CRUD operations such as adding, editing, and deleting albums. The system is deployed using Vercel for the frontend and Render for the backend, ensuring scalability and real-world usability.

title: Real-Time Crypto Forecasting App
description:
Developed and deployed an interactive time-series forecasting web application that predicts cryptocurrency prices using historical market data. The system enables users to dynamically select assets and adjust forecasting parameters, providing real-time visualization of actual versus predicted trends.

Implemented a complete end-to-end pipeline including data fetching, preprocessing, sequence generation, model training, and performance evaluation using RMSE. Designed with a focus on usability, modularity, and practical application of machine learning concepts.

title: ScanMe – AI-Based Body Posture Analysis System
description:
Developed a web-based AI-powered posture analysis system that detects body alignment issues using full-body images. Integrated MediaPipe Pose and OpenCV to extract 33 skeletal landmarks and compute joint angles for identifying posture deviations such as shoulder imbalance, spine tilt, and hip misalignment.

Designed a seamless Laravel–Python integration pipeline where user-uploaded images are processed through a backend AI script, returning structured posture insights via a responsive web interface.

Implemented rule-based classification algorithms achieving approximately 85% overall accuracy across multiple posture metrics. Built with scalability and usability in mind, featuring a mobile-friendly UI, chatbot guidance, and informative feedback reports.

⚠️ Designed as a posture screening tool for awareness purposes, not for medical diagnosis.

title: Planova
description: Planova, a modern web-based event management platform created to transform the way people organize weddings, birthdays, and engagements. The system combines event creation, theme customization, budget tracking, vendor package browsing, and secure online payments into a seamless experience. With a responsive and user-friendly interface, Planova is designed to make event planning stress-free and efficient, while showcasing the power of full-stack web technologies in solving real-world challenges.
